creator: hhyou@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Hello,

Please use this patch instead. (update to 1.1.9),
http://www.cs.nctu.edu.tw/~hhyou/rubygem-vmail.1.1.9.diff

Thanks.

2010/12/28  <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] mail/rubygem-vmail: update to 1.1.7
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->ruby
> Responsible-Changed-By: edwin
> Responsible-Changed-When: Tue Dec 28 01:40:15 UTC 2010
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> ruby@ wants this port PRs (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)
>
